title: JSON Upload Starts Loop Proof v1
summary: Adds Phase169 proof files showing a user-provided JSON in command_inbox can start the request-ready path, target the exact ZIP, proceed through apply, QA Guarantee, safe merge approval, and closeout with clipboard handoff capture.

changes.purpose: Operator-facing proof documentation and acceptance criteria.
Verifier for Phase169 proof files, runtime markers, and JSON upload request artifacts.

hardStops: A user-provided JSON must be the input contract for REQUEST_READY proof.
Merge approval may move only after PASS_GUARANTEED.
Closeout must wait for CLOSED_CLEANLY and ignore PASS/PASS_GUARANTEED.
This overlay does not add credentials, tokens, paid services, dependency installs, security-setting changes, or startup persistence.
